Package noppes.npcs.api.entity

Interface IEnergySlicer<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IEnergyAbility<T>, IEnergyProjectile<T>, IEntity<T>
    public interface IEnergySlicer<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
extends IEnergyProjectile<T>
    A thin, wide blade projectile that slices through targets.

    Slicers travel in a straight line, cutting through entities in their path.

    • Method Summary

      float getSliceWidth()
      Width of the slicer blade.
